trending.title: Trending in Similar Teams
trending.disclaimer: Anonymous ranking based on usage data from {count} teams in the same category. You can opt out in settings.
trending.amazon_associate_footer: This page participates in the Amazon Associates Program.
trending.no_data: Not enough teams in the same category to show rankings yet.

trending.opt_out_message: Your team's equipment data will no longer be included in anonymous rankings. You can still view rankings. Changes take effect from the next daily calculation.
trending.opt_in_message: Your team's equipment data will be included in rankings again. Changes take effect from the next daily calculation.
